creator: svyatoslav.lempert@gmail.com
text:
- Update to 4.4.4
	- IGNORE with PHP 5.5 and FreeBSD 10 (unsupported by vendor)

--- ioncube-4.4.4.patch begins here ---
diff -Nru ioncube.old/Makefile ioncube/Makefile
--- ioncube.old/Makefile	2013-09-20 17:04:43.000000000 +0000
+++ ioncube/Makefile	2013-10-17 03:15:33.000000000 +0000
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: devel/ioncube/Makefile 327723 2013-09-20 17:04:43Z bapt $
 
 PORTNAME=	ioncube
-DISTVERSION=	4.4.2
+DISTVERSION=	4.4.4
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads3.ioncube.com/loader_downloads/ \
 		http://dl.ispsystem.info/ioncube/${DISTVERSION}/ \
@@ -22,9 +22,18 @@
 DIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}/${DISTVERSION}
 
 NO_STAGE=	yes
+
+# PHP 5.5 is unsupported 
+IGNORE_WITH_PHP=55
+
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
-# Detect OS Version
+# FreeBSD 10 is unsupported
+.if ${OSVERSION} >= 1000000
+IGNORE=	is unsupported on FreeBSD 10
+.endif
+
+# Detect OS version for distname
 VER=	8
 .if ${OSVERSION} >= 900000
 VER=	9
diff -Nru ioncube.old/distinfo ioncube/distinfo
--- ioncube.old/distinfo	2013-08-31 17:43:38.000000000 +0000
+++ ioncube/distinfo	2013-10-17 03:20:19.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
-SHA256 (ioncube/4.4.2/ioncube_loaders_fre_8_x86-64.tar.bz2) = a95b62d88e9fc41cc8eb6dc021770efee92385ea23faa1fedfd4977abe8a9567
-SIZE (ioncube/4.4.2/ioncube_loaders_fre_8_x86-64.tar.bz2) = 3561576
-SHA256 (ioncube/4.4.2/ioncube_loaders_fre_8_x86.tar.bz2) = 9d83c1d6675265dd146cca1244e9f8bb1314582db264f0e8911963d80e14becc
-SIZE (ioncube/4.4.2/ioncube_loaders_fre_8_x86.tar.bz2) = 3444511
-SHA256 (ioncube/4.4.2/ioncube_loaders_fre_9_x86-64.tar.bz2) = 20fcf70855641fe501ebe9e2c209d2dbe2b5724b140b18be531ecb2699ffc393
-SIZE (ioncube/4.4.2/ioncube_loaders_fre_9_x86-64.tar.bz2) = 3724728
-SHA256 (ioncube/4.4.2/ioncube_loaders_fre_9_x86.tar.bz2) = e071433872d238b1341629c365f4fe20c7ab3f55394ce51c819d4b5302f64fc6
-SIZE (ioncube/4.4.2/ioncube_loaders_fre_9_x86.tar.bz2) = 3432102
+SHA256 (ioncube/4.4.4/ioncube_loaders_fre_8_x86-64.tar.bz2) = a70a6a5178183c7a26c9b2fc57864cff8b06aba20654ba3c37c5efd8375feab3
+SIZE (ioncube/4.4.4/ioncube_loaders_fre_8_x86-64.tar.bz2) = 3583444
+SHA256 (ioncube/4.4.4/ioncube_loaders_fre_8_x86.tar.bz2) = 030ded6b03c7a77430fd0c8af50fd232c942cd86ed3eae435a0222548ca6a859
+SIZE (ioncube/4.4.4/ioncube_loaders_fre_8_x86.tar.bz2) = 3459030
+SHA256 (ioncube/4.4.4/ioncube_loaders_fre_9_x86-64.tar.bz2) = 8c7b608ff1deb0149f3e22dcace2b126c87c66d9fb21471a7631fa8ccae39a98
+SIZE (ioncube/4.4.4/ioncube_loaders_fre_9_x86-64.tar.bz2) = 3738449
+SHA256 (ioncube/4.4.4/ioncube_loaders_fre_9_x86.tar.bz2) = cdaf267eb2798d754805acef81628f3e3f9fade02dc637f901284396454e9fe3
+SIZE (ioncube/4.4.4/ioncube_loaders_fre_9_x86.tar.bz2) = 3445366
--- ioncube-4.4.4.patch ends here ---
